  "text": "The scikit-learn codebase implements structured logging and warning mechanisms across many files:\n\n**ConvergenceWarning** is defined in `sklearn/exceptions.py` as a custom UserWarning subclass. It is raised in many estimators when iterative algorithms fail to converge within max_iter iterations:\n- Linear models: `sklearn/linear_model/_cd_fast.pyx`, `_coordinate_descent.py`, `_sag.py`, `_ridge.py`, `_ransac.py`, `_quantile.py`, `_theil_sen.py`, `_least_angle.py`, `_stochastic_gradient.py`, `_glm/_newton_solver.py`\n- SVM: `sklearn/svm/_base.py`\n- Clustering: `sklearn/cluster/_affinity_propagation.py`, `_birch.py`, `_kmeans.py`\n- Mixture models: `sklearn/mixture/_base.py`\n- Decomposition: `sklearn/decomposition/_nmf.py`, `_fastica.py`, `_factor_analysis.py`\n- Neighbors: `sklearn/neighbors/_nca.py`\n- Neural network: `sklearn/neural_network/_multilayer_perceptron.py`\n- Imputation: `sklearn/impute/_iterative.py`\n- Semi-supervised: `sklearn/semi_supervised/_label_propagation.py`\n- Utility: `sklearn/utils/optimize.py`\n\n**check_is_fitted** is defined in `sklearn/utils/validation.py` and raises NotFittedError when an estimator's predict/transform methods are called before fit. It is used across: `sklearn/base.py`, `sklearn/dummy.py`, `sklearn/pipeline.py`, `sklearn/isotonic.py`, `sklearn/multiclass.py`, `sklearn/svm/_base.py`, `sklearn/mixture/_base.py`, and many others.\n\n**Verbose parameter logging** is implemented via print statements conditioned on `self.verbose` or a `verbose` argument across many estimators:\n- `sklearn/utils/_user_interface.py` provides `_message_with_time` and `_print_elapsed_time` context manager for timing-based verbose output, used in `sklearn/pipeline.py`, `sklearn/ensemble/_base.py`, `sklearn/multioutput.py`\n- `sklearn/mixture/_base.py` has dedicated methods `_print_verbose_msg_init_beg`, `_print_verbose_msg_iter_end`, `_print_verbose_msg_init_end`\n- Many estimators use inline verbose prints: `sklearn/cluster/_kmeans.py`, `_bisect_k_means.py`, `_spectral.py`, `_affinity_propagation.py`; `sklearn/manifold/_t_sne.py`, `_mds.py`; `sklearn/decomposition/_dict_learning.py`, `_lda.py`; `sklearn/neighbors/_nca.py`, `_quad_tree.pyx`; `sklearn/impute/_iterative.py`; `sklearn/covariance/_graph_lasso.py`; `sklearn/feature_selection/_rfe.py`; `sklearn/linear_model/_theil_sen.py`, `_bayes.py`, `_glm/_newton_solver.py`; `sklearn/neural_network/_rbm.py`; `sklearn/semi_supervised/_self_training.py`; `sklearn/model_selection/_search_successive_halving.py`; `sklearn/ensemble/_voting.py`"

The function `check_fit_check_is_fitted` in `sklearn/utils/estimator_checks.py` validates this behavior for all estimators. It is used in: `sklearn/base.py`, `sklearn/dummy.py`, `sklearn/pipeline.py`, `sklearn/isotonic.py`, `sklearn/multiclass.py`, `sklearn/svm/_base.py`, `sklearn/mixture/_base.py`, `sklearn/model_selection/_classification_threshold.py`, and many more.\n\n**3.
